name: Luminar Network
notes: Reviewed identity overlay because live chain metadata currently reports a placeholder name for SN87. Re-review pass (2026-07-15): gave the source-repo surface a proper name/notes (was the generic placeholder "unknown community source-repo") and added the top-level source_repo field, which was missing despite the surface already being tracked.

surfaces.name: Luminar Network website
surfaces.notes: Official project website. The page identifies Luminar Network as Bittensor SN87 and links to official docs and demo surfaces.

surfaces.name: Luminar Network docs
surfaces.notes: Official GitBook documentation for Luminar Network.

surfaces.name: Luminar VMS demo
surfaces.notes: Public demo app linked from the official Luminar Network website.

surfaces.name: Luminar Network Taopedia article
surfaces.notes: Discovered from the public Taopedia article repository. Not verified as an operational interface.
surfaces.rate_limit_notes: Candidate only; no recurring probe is configured until maintainer review.

surfaces.name: Luminar Network Tensorplex subnet docs
surfaces.notes: Discovered from Tensorplex subnet-docs. Useful as documentation enrichment, not verified operational authority.
surfaces.rate_limit_notes: Candidate only; no recurring probe is configured until maintainer review.

surfaces.name: Luminar Network TaoMarketCap dashboard
surfaces.notes: Universal TaoMarketCap subnet dashboard candidate. Third-party enrichment, not protocol authority.
surfaces.rate_limit_notes: Candidate only; no recurring probe is configured until maintainer review.

surfaces.name: Luminar Network source repository
surfaces.notes: Official SN87 miner/validator source repository (org name matches the file's own "Luminar Network" identity) -- verified live 2026-07-15. Already cited as a source for the existing health and benchmark-submission surfaces.

surfaces.name: Luminar Network health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /healthz on luminar.network returning gateway liveness (observed plain-text response: ok). Served on the official SN87 website host registered in this manifest and linked from the Luminar source repository README.

surfaces.name: Luminar benchmark submission sample
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth CSV sample miner detection output (video_id, frame_idx, category, n_items, box_2d columns with bounding-box JSON) published in the official Luminar-Network/luminar-sn repository at benchmark/test/test_submission.csv. Documents the per-frame submission schema scored by luminar/validator/scoring.py and illustrated in the README Required output format section for SN87 traffic object-detection agents.

surfaces.name: Luminar Network docs llms.txt index
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth machine-readable llms.txt index of the official Luminar Network (SN87) documentation, served at docs.luminar.network — the same official docs domain already registered as the sn-87-luminar-docs surface and as the file's docs_url. Provides an agent-consumable Markdown map of the Luminar docs (Introduction, System Architecture, Agentic Competition, Incentive Mechanism, Tokenomics & Emissions, Roadmap) for LLM/agent ingestion; content begins '# Luminar Network'. Distinct from the HTML GitBook docs page (a different URL and a machine-readable text/markdown artifact).
